Gitea versions up to and including 1.26.1 have insufficient permission checks for Composer package source links, which can expose private or internal package source information.

### Summary
A critical vulnerability has been discovered in Gitea. It was already reported via (security@gitea.io) from (dev@noscope.com), and submitted an encrypted report.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.40738, "percentile": 0.9848}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8qw8-rq86-9pc2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-17T19:04:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qw8-rq86-9pc2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8qw8-rq86-9pc2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-27771"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-03T21:16:59Z", "published_at": "2026-07-17T19:04:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-8qw8-rq86-9pc2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27771", "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/pull/37610", "https://blog.gitea.com/release-of-1.26.2", "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/releases/tag/v1.26.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qw8-rq86-9pc2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-8qw8-rq86-9pc2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea", "summary": "Gitea has insufficient permission checks for Composer package source links", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-17T19:04:38Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qw8-rq86-9pc2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.26.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Gitea has insufficient permission checks for Composer package source links
